report_name: New Executive Order 14390 Shifts US Federal Focus to Combating Cybercrime Against Citizens

identities.name: U.S. Government
identities.description: Author and signatory of Executive Order 14390, 'Combating Cybercrime, Fraud, and Predatory Schemes Against American Citizens,' shifting national cybersecurity strategy to include the disruption of cybercrime affecting citizens and businesses. The effort involves agencies such as CISA, the FBI, and the Secret Service.

identities.name: Information Sharing and Analysis Centers (ISACs)
identities.description: A class of organizations recommended for private sector engagement to share and receive timely threat intelligence, as part of the proactive response to Executive Order 14390.
